# Desi Dhamaka

> Authentic Indian restaurant with three New Jersey locations — South Plainfield, Oak Tree (Edison), and Lawrenceville — serving Andhra and Hyderabadi cuisine including biryani, tandoori, mandi, and curries. Visitors can browse the menu, view current offers, book a table, order online, or explore the gallery for any location.

Every page lives under a location-scoped path: `/{location}/{page}/`, where `{location}` is one of `south-plainfield`, `oak-tree`, or `lawrenceville`. The examples below use `lawrenceville`; swap the segment to view another location's pages.

## Key pages
- [Choose a location](https://desidhamakanj.net/): pick which Desi Dhamaka location to browse
- [Home](https://desidhamakanj.net/lawrenceville/): location homepage
- [Menu](https://desidhamakanj.net/lawrenceville/menu/): full food menu with prices
- [About](https://desidhamakanj.net/lawrenceville/about/): restaurant story, philosophy, and culinary team
- [Special Offers](https://desidhamakanj.net/lawrenceville/special-offers/): current promotions and deals
- [Catering](https://desidhamakanj.net/lawrenceville/catering/): catering services
- [Private Dining & Parties](https://desidhamakanj.net/lawrenceville/parties/): private event bookings
- [Reservations](https://desidhamakanj.net/lawrenceville/reservation/): book a table online
- [Online Ordering](https://desidhamakanj.net/lawrenceville/online-ordering/): order food for pickup or delivery
- [Gallery](https://desidhamakanj.net/lawrenceville/gallery/): restaurant and food photos
- [Testimonials](https://desidhamakanj.net/lawrenceville/testimonials/): customer reviews
- [Contact](https://desidhamakanj.net/lawrenceville/contact/): hours, phone, address, and directions

## Notes
- Menu items, hours, offers, and contact details vary by location — always confirm specifics on the location-specific page rather than assuming they match across locations.
- Pages under /admin/ are a management console, not public content, and should not be indexed or cited.
